items.title: Jupiter rallies 23% as Spot demand surges – But THIS may cap JUP’s upside
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jupiter's 23% rally indicates strong spot demand, but potential limitations on its growth could affect liquidity and trading strategies within the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Solana: Amid rising ETF inflows and whale demand, will SOL break $97?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Increased ETF inflows and whale activity may push SOL towards the $97 mark, impacting market sentiment and liquidity dynamics for Solana.

items.title: Exodus launches AI agent-focused stablecoin on Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of an AI agent-focused stablecoin on Solana could enhance ecosystem usage and attract new projects, potentially increasing overall network activity.
